name: Pirate's Dual
short_description: A 2D pixel-art PvP ship battle game where you outplay opponents with smart attack and defense tactics. Climb matchmaking, join tournaments, earn in-game currency, unlock skins, and more.
detailed_description:
Pirate's Dual is a 2D pixel-art PvP ship-battle game where every match is a test of aim, timing, and smart tactics.
Choose your ship, enter the arena, and outplay your opponents using a mix of attack patterns, defense maneuvers, and special abilities.

Battle in real-time multiplayer, climb ranked matchmaking, or duel your friends in private matches.
Prove your skill in tournaments, earn in-game currency, unlock unique cosmetic skins, and trade them freely on the Steam Marketplace.

Key Features

  • PvP Battles
    Quick, competitive 1v1 fights with pixel-perfect action.

  • Attack & Defense Tactics
    Dodge incoming shots, counter, shield, and outmaneuver your enemy.

  • Matchmaking & Friend Battles
    Play ranked, queue for casual matches, or invite a friend directly.

  • Tournament Mode
    Compete for rewards and show who’s actually the best.

  • In-Game Currency System
    Earn currency by playing and use it for rewards and cosmetics.

  • Unlockable Skins
    Customize your ship with rare, epic, and limited skins.

  • Steam Marketplace Support
    Win tradable skins and freely buy, sell, or trade them with other players.

  • Solo Mode
    Practice, test new strategies, or just chill and improve your aim.

reviews.review_text: Quite Fun and Competitive, recommend at least trying it, alone or with friends.
It's really well-designed, I'm not the type to usually play turn-based games but it piqued my interest, it's going to be even more fun with friends.
solid gameplay and mechanics highly recommend to play with friends
